clusters.neutral_headline: Body found in search for missing Queensland mother
bullet_summary: Police have arrested the former partner of missing woman Jana Armstrong after her body was found near Toowoomba

A 48-year-old man has been charged with murder after the body of missing mother Jana Armstrong was found in bushland late on Saturday

items.title: Why pay a premium fee for a service that isn’t? How the nationwide outage could hurt Telstra
